name: Barangay Clearance
description: Certifies that a resident has good moral character, is law-abiding, and has no pending barangay case or derogatory record.

name: Certificate of Residency
description: Certifies that a person is a bona fide resident of the barangay and may be used for residency verification or legal purposes.

name: Barangay Indigency
description: Certifies that a resident or family belongs to an indigent household and may be used to request assistance or support.

name: First Time Job Seeker
description: Certifies that the applicant is a first-time job seeker and may avail benefits under the First Time Jobseekers Assistance Act.

name: Good Moral
description: Certifies that a resident is law-abiding, has good moral character, and has no record of unlawful activity in the barangay.

name: Small Business
description: Certifies that a resident owns or operates a small livelihood or business within the barangay.
